creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Fri, Jan 12, 2001 at 10:03:57AM -0800, trevor@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: XFree86-4 port doesn't put patch-1 in the attic
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports->asami
> Responsible-Changed-By: trevor
> Responsible-Changed-When: Fri Jan 12 10:01:44 PST 2001
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> This sounds as though it requires some repomeistering.  I wonder whether
> the problem was caused by the recent purging of Attics (did the problem
> happen before Tuesday?).

Hmm didn't Peter Wemm put some files back in the Attics yesterday/today?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
If there were no counterfactuals, this sentence would not have been paradoxical.
